metadata.description: Single Claude Code plugin shipping the skill bundle for github.com/xgodev/boost. One install gets you all 18 skills (boost-core + 17 subsystem skills). Each skill is independently versioned in its own SKILL.md frontmatter.
metadata.convention: Each new feature added to boost (new factory contrib, new wrapper driver, new bootstrap adapter, new middleware) MUST add or update the corresponding skill under cc-plugins/boost/skills/. See cc-plugins/CONTRIBUTING.md for the contributor checklist.

plugins.name: boost
plugins.description: Skill bundle for github.com/xgodev/boost — Iron Laws (boost-core) plus 17 subsystem-specific skills covering Echo APIs, Pub/Sub/NATS/Kafka function adapters, publisher/cache/log/config wrappers, fx modules, extra middleware/health/multiserver, and a maintainer guide.
